rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount is unrelated to Elec. Code §277.004, which governs city charter or ordinance requirements for petition signature validity.
quote: Any requirements for the validity or verification of petition signatures in addition to those prescribed by this chapter that are prescribed by a home-rule city charter provision or a city ordinance are effective only if the charter provision or ordinance was in effect September 1, 1985.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election petition signatures, not property tax exemptions.
